page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Facilitating knowledge discovery in life sciences by machine-aided skim reading.

SKIMMR - a research prototype for machine-aided skim reading (includes back-end code for generating a graph-like knowledge base from texts and a standalone HTTP server-based UI)
